content:
Clashes that contain the same task already exist:
(base 10 to any base) https://www.codingame.com/contribute/view/589834f5753fcb0637206e02b1045db25b35
(base 10 to base 12) https://www.codingame.com/contribute/view/2192723d5710a85141d6255b36d199c04fe20
(base 10 to base 26) https://www.codingame.com/contribute/view/4899baea0f1c8f946227968dd0258f3b72aa

Please use another idea for your contribution. Thanks.
